ext.name: Uptime Monitor
ext.description: Track uptime monitor stats for website, server & network. Get instant downtime alerts and availability reports 24/7.

dashboard.title: Server status
dashboard.empty_subtitle: Add a URL to start tracking uptime

add_monitor.title: Add monitor
add_monitor.hint_api: Sends a GET or POST request to the API endpoint. By default, any 2xx response is treated as healthy. HTML responses are treated as failures
add_monitor.hint_api_headers: Enter one header per line in the format Name: value. Use the auth section below for Authorization
add_monitor.hint_api_body: Used for POST requests. Content-Type is added automatically unless you set it yourself
add_monitor.hint_api_expected_status: Leave empty to accept any successful 2xx response
add_monitor.hint_api_response_body: Case-sensitive substring match against the raw response body
add_monitor.hint_api_response_json: Use dot notation, for example data.status or items.0.id
add_monitor.hint_url: Name will be set automatically from domain
add_monitor.error_invalid_host: Enter a valid host, IP, or HTTP/HTTPS URL
add_monitor.error_invalid_url: Enter a valid http or https URL
add_monitor.error_invalid_api_headers: Enter headers one per line in the format Name: value
add_monitor.error_invalid_api_authorization_header: Do not duplicate Authorization in headers. Use the auth section below
add_monitor.error_invalid_api_basic_auth_username: Enter a username for Basic auth
add_monitor.error_invalid_api_status: Enter a valid HTTP status from 100 to 599
add_monitor.error_invalid_api_response_body: Enter the text that must appear in the response

settings.title: Settings
settings.telegram_setup_step_1: Open the bot and send /start in Telegram.
settings.telegram_setup_step_2: Open @userinfobot and copy your numeric Telegram user ID.
settings.telegram_setup_step_3: Paste the Telegram ID below, enable Telegram notifications, and send a test message.
settings.telegram_chat_id_hint: Paste your numeric Telegram user ID from @userinfobot, for example 123456789
settings.connectivity_hint: Used to detect internet connectivity with an HTTP/HTTPS request in Chromium. Change it if the default target is blocked
settings.error_invalid_ping_target: Enter a valid host, IP, or HTTP/HTTPS URL
settings.error_unable_to_save_ping_target: Unable to save ping URL right now
settings.error_unable_to_clear: Unable to clear monitors right now
settings.error_unable_to_update_notifications: Unable to update notifications right now
settings.error_unable_to_update_telegram: Unable to update Telegram settings right now
settings.error_unable_to_send_telegram_test: Unable to send a Telegram test message right now
settings.error_unable_to_update_interval: Unable to update the default interval right now

monitor.error_api_html_response: The API endpoint returned an HTML page instead of an API response
monitor.error_api_response_body_mismatch: The API response body did not match the expected text
monitor.error_api_response_json_mismatch: The API JSON response did not match the expected value
monitor.error_api_invalid_json: The API endpoint did not return valid JSON
monitor.error_check_failed: Unable to complete the latest check

monitor_details.error_check_now: Unable to run a manual check right now
monitor_details.error_toggle: Unable to update this monitor right now
monitor_details.error_delete: Unable to delete this monitor right now

notification.down_message: The latest uptime check failed for $1.
notification.telegram_test_message:
Uptime Monitor test message
Sent at $1
